headline: Why Crown Castle (CCI) Is Rewriting Its Tower Story As Analysts Reassess Growth And Value
summary: Crown Castle’s latest analyst update centers on a modest fair value adjustment to US$97.22 from about US$98.81, a move of roughly 1.6% that refines how the stock is being framed right now. That shift sits against a split analyst backdrop, with some research desks trimming price targets on softer organic growth assumptions while others highlight an Outperform call with a US$102 target and inclusion on a current favorites list. As you read on, you will see how to track these evolving views and...
